name: Jackson Logue
bio: Hi everyone! I’m Jackson Logue, President of the John Marshall Pre-Law Society. I’m passionate about the law and exploring its many paths. Outside of school, I love traveling, and have studied abroad in Europe and Australia. I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished as a board this year with JMPLS.

name: Jasmine Kouhestani
bio: Hi everyone! I’m Jasmine Kouhestani, Vice President of the John Marshall Pre-Law Society. Outside of school, I love reading and traveling, having visited Switzerland and heading to Australia this winter. I’m excited for an amazing year ahead with JMPLS.

name: Amrita Singh
bio: Hey everyone! I’m a junior majoring in Finance with a minor in Political Science, and I’m honored to be the Secretary for JMPLS this year! Some of my interests include writing, traveling, and watching Formula One!

name: Nathan Banh
bio: Hi everyone! I’m a senior majoring in Global Business at UTD, and I’m thrilled to be serving as Treasurer for JMPLS this year. When I’m not busy with school or club activities, I enjoy trying new foods, writing, playing golf and basketball, and playing poker.

name: Jesus Carrillo
bio: Hi everyone! I’m a junior Political Science major on the pre-law track. This year, I’ve loved managing our marketing, and I’m excited to make JMPLS even better! I plan to become an immigration attorney. I’m passionate about helping other families find the same opportunities. As a first-gen college student, I’m proud to be paving the way for my family!

name: Rohith Raman
bio: Hi everyone. I’m Rohith Raman, and I’m the Operational Affairs Chair of the John Marshall Pre-Law Society. Outside of classes, I love listening to music and (much like Nathan,) playing golf! I’m looking forward to an eventful year with JMPLS!!
